_meta.purpose: Chunk-level retrieval quality ground truth. Replaces the top-3 proxy in scripts/voyage_chunk_ab.py once labeling_status flips to 'labeled'. Until then, the harness logs a WARN and falls through to the proxy.
_meta.topic_bias_caveat: Holdout-live ideas (saas/devtools/regulated) are intentionally off-topic for the only populated multi-provider Mongo session available on 2026-05-02. Many candidates will look obviously irrelevant — that IS the signal. A future dogfood ingest on topics matching holdout-live ideas is gated by S20 risk #4.
_meta.labeling_instructions: Move chunk_keys from _candidates into must_cite / should_cite / must_not_cite for each idea. must_cite = retrieval MUST surface this chunk to count as success. should_cite = bonus credit if surfaced. must_not_cite = penalty if surfaced. After labeling any idea, set labeling_status='labeled' (top-level _meta) ONLY when all ideas have at least one must_cite entry.
_meta._TODO_HUMAN_REVIEW: Until labeling_status flips to 'labeled', tests/eval/test_labels_schema.py still passes (candidates_only is a valid status), but scripts/voyage_chunk_ab.py logs a WARN and reverts to the top-3 proxy.
